overview: Ifrit is a SubBoss-class Elemental/Humanoid monster found in Firedeep. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 750 HP, 28 physical damage, 100 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 1, MaxImpactEndurance 1. 8 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Melee Attack3 at 150% ratio (420 base damage). Nightmare gains 3 exclusive abilityies: Fireball Nightmare, Melee Attack3, Melee Attack3 From 2.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 6 melee attacks. Melee Attack1 (130%), Melee Attack1 Combo (110%), Melee Attack2 (120%), and more.

combo_flow.description: 1 combo chains across 1 entry points. Attacks chain from one to the next based on the AI's positioning and target state.

status_effects_detail.name: Fireball Burn
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Fireball Burn icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Sword Burn
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Sword Burn icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weakness: Ice
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Ice (-3000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Fire
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Fire (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Fireball Nightmare, Melee Attack3, Melee Attack3 From 2
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 3 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Fireball Nightmare, Melee Attack3, Melee Attack3 From 2. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 50 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 3 exclusive abilities: Fireball Nightmare, Melee Attack3, Melee Attack3 From 2

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.stuck_description: Has stuck-detection failsafes in behavior tree.
